commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh Then answered I them, and said unto them, The God of heaven, he will prosper us; therefore we his servants will arise and build: but you have no portion, nor right, nor memorial, in Jerusalem. Septuagint, "returned them an account (logon). we are his pure servants, and we will build. "(Haydock) Part, or business, 1 Esdras iv. Justice, or right to the city. (Calmet) You may mind your own affairs. (Tirinus) Remembrance. It was esteemed a high honour to be a citizen of Jerusalem, Psalm lxxxvi.
